title: Front-end Private Link for account-level Genie One (Beta)
body: You can now configure front-end Private Link for account-level Genie One. Turn on the **Front-end Private Link for Custom URLs and Account** preview to get started. See [Configure inbound Private Link for account-level resources](/aws/en/security/network/front-end/front-end-private-connect-account).

ref_links.text: Configure inbound Private Link for account-level resources
